title: SignalShape Envelope
description: Outer wrapper for every SignalShape message. Identifies shape, contract version, and producer.

shape.description: Message shape. Only handoff/status/decision/debug are machine-validatable in v0.1.

producer.description: Agent identifier. Kebab-case ASCII for routing/logging.

consumer_hint.description: Hint about expected consumer. Not enforced.

confidence.description: Producer self-assessed confidence. Discrete buckets, not floats.

requires_human.description: If true, asks for human input. If omitted, consumers MUST interpret as false.
